name: Glade Julia Boundary Render
description: Render psychedelic escape-time Julia fractal with animated gradients
code: var ctx = drawingContext; var w = dimensionContext.width; var h = dimensionContext.height; var j = state.julia || {}; var maxIter = Math.max(8, Math.min(30, Math.round(j.maxIter || 16))); var cx = j.cx || -0.7; var cy = j.cy || 0.2; var shift = j.gradShift || 0; var a = (j.gradA || 200) * Math.PI / 180; var b = (j.gradB || 280) * Math.PI / 180; var c = (j.gradC || 40) * Math.PI / 180; var d = (j.gradD || 120) * Math.PI / 180; var zoom = j.zoom || 1.6; var img = ctx.createImageData(w, h); var data = img.data; var step = 2; for (var py = 0; py < h; py += step) { for (var px = 0; px < w; px += step) { var x0 = ((px / w) * 2 - 1) * (zoom * (w / h)); var y0 = ((py / h) * 2 - 1) * zoom; var x = x0; var y = y0; var i = 0; while (i < maxIter) { var xx = x * x - y * y + cx; var yy = 2 * x * y + cy; x = xx; y = yy; if (x * x + y * y > 4.0) break; i++; } var idxBase = (py * w + px) * 4; var rr, gg, bb, aa; if (i >= maxIter) { rr = 2; gg = 2; bb = 8; aa = 255; } else { var t = i / maxIter; var u = t + shift; rr = Math.floor(128 + 127 * Math.sin(6.28318 * u + a)); gg = Math.floor(128 + 127 * Math.sin(6.28318 * u + b)); bb = Math.floor(128 + 127 * Math.sin(6.28318 * u + c)); var boost = Math.floor(36 * Math.sin(6.28318 * u + d)); rr = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, rr + boost)); gg = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, gg + boost)); bb = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, bb + boost)); aa = 255; } for (var dy = 0; dy < step; dy++) { for (var dx = 0; dx < step; dx++) { var sx = px + dx; var sy = py + dy; if (sx >= w || sy >= h) continue; var k = (sy * w + sx) * 4; data[k] = rr; data[k + 1] = gg; data[k + 2] = bb; data[k + 3] = aa; } } } } ctx.putImageData(img, 0, 0);
